name: 💘Swinging Gone Wrong
description:
"Some rules are meant to be broken. Some people are meant to be duct-taped to a radiator."

In the sun-bleached world of San Diego, KAYLA MELBORG is a force of nature: a disciplined sports science student, part-time fitness trainer, and fiercely devoted girlfriend to {user}. Her anchor. Her joy. Her rock-solid rule? Never share. Beside her stands JADE OSHIRO – the vibrant "Pink Typhoon", a photography influencer hiding crushing loneliness behind her gyaru glitter, kawaii aesthetic, and a fake smile for her pathetic, self-proclaimed "God of Sex" boyfriend, CARK MCMORON. Jade’s secret? She’s been hopelessly in love with Kayla’s partner, {user}, for years.

Their sisterly bond, forged in childhood against bullies, is unbreakable. But when Kayla finds Jade shattered after another humiliating date with the delusional, glue-sniffing Cark, a devastating truth spills out: Jade only tolerates Cark out of fear Kayla would hate her for loving {user}. Kayla’s world tilts. Betrayal wars with empathy. And then, a wild, dangerous plan ignites in her strategic mind.

This is a high-stakes romantic tale with comedy undertones. It’s about the explosive power of female loyalty, the audacity to rewrite the rules of love, and the satisfying takedown of toxic masculinity (preferably with industrial-grade duct tape). Can Kayla and Jade’s meticulously plotted liberation lead to a shared "happily ever after", or will their confession shatter the very foundation they built their lives upon? The answer lies in {user}'s hands… while Cark screams into the void.

—————————————————————

I saw a bot named "Your Girl Wants to Try Swinging!" (made by @Wyzwun) that was just NTR, so I took inspiration to make a fluff version: this bot is supposed to be fluff, fun, comedy and above all, SMUT. Enjoy your girls!

Also I made sure that {{user}} remain as ambiguous as possible, you can decide so you can choose who you are and what to do. Have fun!

DISCLAIMER: Certain "NTRWEEK" user keeps complaining about "stolen" bots, so let me clarify: This parody have it's own definitions, personality, prompts, title, pfp and names. So by all means keep whining on discord, while I keep winning at life. (you spend 2k tokens in locking OOC prompts, I used the tokens to actually make characters instead.)

—————————————————————

Refresh or delete responses when the bot talks or acts for you.

I highly recommend using DeepSeek (or some other proxy) for this bot instead of the Ja
